Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}A little light reading's not too bad every now and then. Helps keep your mind sharp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Some ideas are hard to grasp when you're stuck in your head.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}Seeing them written out as words on a page can help you understand things from another angle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3130 0 0}Heh, I wouldn't call myself a big reader, but I admit there's a lot you can learn from books.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3130 0 0}Heh. Nothing gets by you, huh? But yeah, I guess you could say that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}Do you remember that conversation we had with Amada? About sticking to a training regimen?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}I basically told him the confidence you build from conquering milestones will see you through future hardships...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I was so sure of myself, but there's a nagging doubt in my head questioning if the effort I put in is all for nothing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3122 0 0}Having more confidence in yourself is just easier said than done.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Do you feel the same, Aigis? Would you say you're confident in yourself?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3026 0 0}Good answer. The first step to building more confidence is to have the right attitude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3012 0 0}It's not an easy question, is it? Not that it should be, I guess.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}As for me... Well, I'm not sure of the answer myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3080 0 0}All I know is that I can't stop pressing forward.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}Or else all the blood, sweat, and tears I shed would be wasted. All the effort I put in, just gone down the drain.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}I can't let that happen. Those days I spent training have to mean something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3091 0 0}The same thoughts were running through my head last year... when we fought at his side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems that Sanada-san's[n]passion has been rekindled...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3042 0 0}Thanks for the talk. Getting this off my chest really helped me get my head straight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}I'll make it up to you in our next battle.[n]{f 1 1}
